title: bolbodium pusillum
intro: Bolbodium pusillum, also known as the small-flowered wintergreen or creeping wintergreen, is a low-growing, perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of methyl salicylate. The health benefits of Bolbodium pusillum include its potential to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, making it a useful remedy for conditions such as arthritis and sore muscles. Bolbodium pusillum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
